content.fact_text: Implements comprehensive API Data Transfer Objects (DTOs) and Zod validation schemas for the user management domain, providing a strict contract for HTTP interfaces.

provenance_data.behaviour: Defines shared TypeScript types and Zod schemas for user registration, profile updates, and MFA workflows. Ensures type safety and input validation across the API layer.
provenance_data.utility: Provides strictly typed and validated data structures for the API interface layer, ensuring input sanitization and consistent API response contracts.
